title: Carpet 2 Wool
description: Lets you craft 3 carpets into 2 wool blocks. Works for all colors.
body:
# Carpet 2 Wool

Recycle your carpets into wool blocks with a simple crafting recipe!

## Features
- Convert colored carpets back into corresponding wool blocks.  
- Each recipe uses 3 carpets to craft 2 wool blocks.  
- Works for all vanilla colors.  

## Installation
1. Download the datapack zip.  
2. Place it in the `datapacks` folder of your world.  
3. Launch or reload your world to enable the datapack.

## Compatibility
- Compatible with Minecraft 1.21.4.
- Future versions will be supported.  

## Feedback and Issues
- If you have suggestions or encounter any issues, feel free to open an issue on the repository or leave a comment on Modrinth.

Enjoy turning carpets back into wool!
